tickets.title: Wire leaderboard_history SQL table
tickets.description: Connect leaderboard tracking to persistent SQLite table so history survives restarts. Schema: user_id, score, timestamp.

tickets.title: Split bot.py into modules
tickets.description: bot.py is getting large. Split into: main.py (entry), cogs/bible.py, cogs/leaderboard.py, cogs/mod.py, utils/db.py

tickets.title: Deploy bot to Railway
tickets.description: Bot live on Railway with auto-restart on push.

tickets.title: Add Discord slash commands
tickets.description: Migrate prefix commands to slash commands for better UX. /bible, /leaderboard, /roll, etc.

tickets.title: Leaderboard decay / season reset logic
tickets.description: Add weekly/monthly score decay or season resets so leaderboard stays competitive.

tickets.title: 16,914 Bible chunks loaded into SQLite
tickets.description: Full KJV Bible chunked and embedded into SQLite RAG database. Used by TankPit bot for verse lookup and semantic search.

tickets.title: Semantic verse search (RAG)
tickets.description: Query Bible by meaning/topic rather than exact text. Uses embeddings + cosine similarity.

tickets.title: Add cross-reference / commentary layer
tickets.description: Enrich chunks with cross-references and brief commentary metadata for richer RAG responses.

tickets.title: Support multiple Bible translations
tickets.description: Add NIV, ESV alongside KJV. User can specify translation in query.

tickets.title: Initial portfolio site build
tickets.description: Full portfolio with hero, skills, experience accordion, projects, education, certs, contact.

tickets.title: CySA+ cert with Credly badge
tickets.description: Add CySA+ badge image and Credly verification link to certs section.

tickets.title: Resume PDF download
tickets.description: Host Uzair_Khan_Resume.pdf and link from hero section.

tickets.title: GitHub Activity feed
tickets.description: Live GitHub events feed on main page via GitHub API.

tickets.title: Terminal easter egg
tickets.description: Backtick-activated terminal with commands: whoami, ls, cat skills, ping, traceroute, cd ops, cd tracker.
tickets.notes: cd ops and cd tracker added for private nav.

tickets.title: Contact form via Formspree
tickets.description: Working contact form sending to email via Formspree.

tickets.title: Job Tracker page
tickets.description: tracker.html — Jira-style job application tracking with status columns, localStorage persistence.

tickets.title: Ops Dashboard
tickets.description: ops.html — private kanban, mail scraper log, GitHub activity, bot status, quick links.
tickets.notes: Linked from footer [ops] and terminal `cd ops`.

tickets.title: NOC / Project Tracker (noc.html)
tickets.description: This page. Jira-style board reading from noc-data.json, edited by Claude.
tickets.notes: Source of truth: noc-data.json in repo root.

tickets.title: GitHub Action — resume auto-update
tickets.description: Action that uses Claude API to regenerate resume text/PDF from latest work history and commits it to repo.

tickets.title: Blog / notes section
tickets.description: Simple markdown-based blog or notes section. Could be static JSON like noc-data.json.

tickets.title: GoatCounter analytics
tickets.description: Add GoatCounter to index.html and tankpit.html. Placeholder script already in place — just needs signup + YOURCODE replaced.
tickets.notes: Sign up at goatcounter.com, get site code, uncomment script in index.html and tankpit.html.

tickets.title: TankPit Bot project deep-dive page
tickets.description: projects/tankpit.html — detailed writeup of bot architecture, Bible RAG, leaderboard system.

tickets.title: More project pages
tickets.description: Deep-dive pages for Mail Scraper, Home Lab setup, maybe Bible RAG project.

tickets.title: Run inbox cleanup script
tickets.description: Execute the mail cleanup script to clear old/junk job emails and reset baseline.

tickets.title: Set up dedicated job email address
tickets.description: Create a separate email for job applications so scraper has clean, isolated inbox.

tickets.title: Auto-parse job emails into tracker
tickets.description: Scraper reads job emails and auto-populates tracker.html localStorage via exported JSON. Closes the loop between scraper and job tracker.

tickets.title: Schedule scraper via cron
tickets.description: Run mail scraper automatically on WSL startup or daily cron instead of manual runs.

tickets.title: SNMP setup on Raspberry Pi
tickets.description: Install and configure SNMP daemon on RPi. Poll via SolarWinds or custom script for network stats.

tickets.title: Grafana dashboard on RPi
tickets.description: Stand up Grafana + Prometheus or InfluxDB on RPi. Dashboard for home network monitoring.

tickets.title: Home network topology map
tickets.description: Document home lab topology. Maybe auto-generate via SNMP discovery.

tickets.title: Pi-hole DNS ad blocking
tickets.description: Install Pi-hole on RPi for network-wide ad/tracker blocking.

tickets.title: Job email scraper script
tickets.description: Python script that scans Gmail/Outlook for job application emails, extracts company/role/status, exports CSV.
tickets.notes: Working. Logged in ops.html scraper section.

tickets.title: Bible chunk ingestion script
tickets.description: Script that parsed KJV text, chunked into 16,914 verses/passages, embedded, and loaded into SQLite.

tickets.title: WSL startup script
tickets.description: Autostart script for WSL: starts Railway tunnel, activates venvs, mounts paths, etc.
